title: Dream — dad as absolute monster (Satan setup)
html:
Dream — dad as absolute monster

Source: 2023-05-08 Apple Note, written 9:52 AM after waking. One-paragraph dream log: the environment of the dream was familiar from previous dreams Yahir has had, but his dad's actions in this one made him "Satan." Yahir woke ambushed, "fuck that was not enjoyable."

TL;DR

  • Yahir's dad (David) appears in a recurring dream-environment but with monstrous behavior — the contrast made it feel like ambush, not just a bad dream
  • Tonally adjacent to the January 2024 "dad in bad state" 3 AM cry — the dad-as-threat motif precedes the real-world episode by 8 months
  • Sits inside the broader yahir family dynamic and the dad wisdom ambivalence (his dad is both source of generosity-modeling and source of dread)
  • Junior-year era — written during the Grants Pass / OSU back-and-forth phase
  • Dream genre: ambush/inversion (familiar environment, transformed actor) — distinct from the earlier tribal fight / shooter prep dream genre

Key quote (verbatim, lightly de-typo'd)

"Had a dream that my dad was an absolute monster. The set-up I feel like was similar to ones I have had before in terms of the environment, but the actions of my dad made him Satan. It's a consciousness out of ambush that I just experienced. Fuck that was not enjoyable."

Open questions

  • What was the recurring "environment" — gym? car? childhood house? Worth tracking across dream logs.
  • Is there a 2023-precursor to the dad-state crisis that hits in Jan 2024?

Related

  • dad wisdom
  • yahir family
  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state
  • 2023 03 26 just dreamt that i was one of the most pursued people in the
